headline: ₹500-1,500 Cr at risk/opportunity via market cap movement from ESG fund flows. — Adani Power's high ESG rating from NSE boosts investor confidence and may drive passive fund inflows.
what_matters: Possible P/E premium due to higher ESG rating; margin impact is indirect.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no penalties.
Potential reduction in cost of capital; increased eligibility for ESG-linked funds.
action: Monitor for sustained ESG rating and potential index inclusion; no immediate action required.
Opportunity: First-mover advantage in ESG disclosure leadership among Indian power utilities.
